summary: AtBat subscriber FGotD in market - Game Tile
description:
GIVEN a user is an Audio Only subscriber
AND a FGotD is scheduled/in-progress in the users viewing market
AND the game level blackedOutVideo equals true in MAST EPGv3
AND the game level entitledVideo equals false in MAST EPGv3

steps.action: WHEN a user views/focuses the FGotD game tile
steps.result:
THEN a lock icon displays in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND the game tile header has a dark overlay over the team colors
AND a blackout pill is displayed in the lower left corner of the game tile
AND the FGotD pill does not display in the game tile
